steps.title: Read the horizontal asymptote
steps.content: For $y=a^x+b$, the graph approaches $y=b$ as $x$ gets very small. The graph flattens at $y=-5$, so $b=-5$.

steps.title: Use a marked point
steps.content:
The graph passes through $(1,2)$. Substitute into $y=a^x+b$:
$$
2=a^1+(-5)
$$
So $a=7$.
